mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date,
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS date,
department,
doctor_id AS doctorId, doctor_name AS doctorName,
IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS registrationFee, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 5 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS drugFee, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 3 OR fee_type = 4 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS examFee, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 2 OR fee_type = 7 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS treatmentFee, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inpatientFee, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN fee_type = 6 OR fee_type = 8 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS otherFee, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM ( SELECT create_time, department, registration_fee AS amount, 1 AS fee_type, doctor_id, doctor_name FROM registration WHERE deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT create_time, department, total_amount AS amount, 5 AS fee_type, doctor_id, doctor_name FROM outpatient_record WHERE deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.create_time, i.department, f.amount, f.fee_type, NULL AS doctor_id, NULL AS doctor_name FROM inpatient_fee f LEFT JOIN inpatient i ON f.inpatient_id = i.id AND i.deleted = 0 WHERE f.deleted = 0 ) AS fee_all WHERE 1 = 1
AND DATE(create_time) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(create_time) <= #{endDate}
AND department = #{department}
AND doctor_id = #{doctorId}
GROUP BY
date
department
doctorId, doctorName
1
ORDER BY
date DESC
totalAmount DESC
